text.title: monitoring-logging Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for monitoring-logging as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Starting containers without log rotation configured.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A container logging 1MB/minute fills a 100G disk in 70 days. With no rotation, the only fix is manual cleanup under incident pressure.

failure-mode.description: Sending raw script output or stack traces as Telegram alerts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Telegram messages render poorly for long text. Raw stack traces exceed the 4096-char limit and get dropped silently. Summarize failures, attach details to logs.
